_comment: Selects which key of the OHBM2026_UI_DATA_PACKAGE_URLS GitHub Actions variable supplies this branch's parquet URLs (see .github/scripts/resolve-data-channel.sh). The 019-progressive-lod-backdrop branch ships the quadtree-LOD backdrop layout (coords.lod_level + per-tier backdrop_lod0..N) on top of the coords/identity split, so it needs its own channel: 'lod-backdrop' points at the rebuilt neuroscape.parquet + atlas.parquet while reusing the byte-identical ohbm2026.parquet. NOTE: this channel's neuroscape.parquet was built --no-semantic-index (no cluster_centroids table), so semantic search resolves to the KNN-only fallback and neuroscape_vectors is omitted. The choice merges with the code: preview, sandbox, and prod for this ref all resolve lod-backdrop.
